original: Any fair-minded assessment of the dangers of the deal between Britain’s National Health Service (NHS) and DeepMind must start by acknowledging that both sides mean well.
translation_literal: 任何对英国国家医疗服务体系和 DeepMind 之间交易危险的公正评估，都必须从承认双方本意良好开始。

chunks.english: Any fair-minded assessment of the dangers of the deal between Britain’s National Health Service (NHS) and DeepMind
chunks.chinese: 任何对英国国家医疗服务体系和 DeepMind 之间交易危险的公正评估

chunks.english: of the dangers of the deal between Britain’s National Health Service (NHS) and DeepMind
chunks.chinese: 关于英国国家医疗服务体系和 DeepMind 之间交易危险的

chunks.english: by acknowledging that both sides mean well
chunks.chinese: 通过承认双方本意良好

chunks.relation: 作 mean 的补足内容

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 长主语 + must start + by doing + that 从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: 主语被多层 of 短语拉长，主干是 assessment must start。

original: DeepMind is one of the leading artificial intelligence (AI) companies in the world.
translation_literal: DeepMind 是世界领先的人工智能公司之一。

chunks.english: one of the leading artificial intelligence (AI) companies in the world
chunks.chinese: 世界领先的人工智能公司之一

original: The potential of this work applied to healthcare is very great, but it could also lead to further concentration of power in the tech giants.
translation_literal: 这项工作应用于医疗保健的潜力非常巨大，但它也可能导致权力在科技巨头中进一步集中。

chunks.english: The potential of this work applied to healthcare is very great
chunks.chinese: 这项工作应用于医疗保健的潜力非常巨大

chunks.english: The potential of this work applied to healthcare
chunks.chinese: 这项工作应用于医疗保健的潜力

chunks.english: but it could also lead to further concentration of power in the tech giants
chunks.chinese: 但它也可能导致权力在科技巨头中进一步集中

chunks.english: further concentration of power in the tech giants
chunks.chinese: 权力在科技巨头中进一步集中
chunks.relation: 作 lead to 的宾语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: A is great, but B could lead to...
sentence_patterns.explanation: but 连接潜力和风险两面。

original: It is against that background that the information commissioner, Elizabeth Denham, has issued her damning verdict against the Royal Free hospital trust under the NHS, which handed over to DeepMind the records of 1.6 million patients in 2015 on the basis of a vague agreement which took far too little account of the patients’ rights and their expectations of privacy.
translation_literal: 正是在这样的背景下，信息专员伊丽莎白·德纳姆对 NHS 旗下皇家自由医院信托作出了严厉裁定；该信托在 2015 年基于一项含糊协议把 160 万患者的记录交给 DeepMind，而该协议远远没有充分考虑患者权利及其隐私期待。

chunks.english: It is against that background that the information commissioner, Elizabeth Denham, has issued her damning verdict against the Royal Free hospital trust under the NHS
chunks.chinese: 正是在这样的背景下，信息专员伊丽莎白·德纳姆作出了严厉裁定

chunks.relation: 强调句中被强调的状语

chunks.chinese: 信息专员伊丽莎白·德纳姆
chunks.relation: 强调句还原后的主句主语

chunks.english: her damning verdict against the Royal Free hospital trust under the NHS
chunks.chinese: 她对 NHS 旗下皇家自由医院信托的严厉裁定

chunks.english: which handed over to DeepMind the records of 1.6 million patients in 2015 on the basis of a vague agreement
chunks.chinese: 该信托在 2015 年基于一项含糊协议把 160 万患者记录交给 DeepMind
chunks.relation: 修饰 Royal Free hospital trust
作 handed over 的宾语
说明 handed over 的对象

chunks.english: on the basis of a vague agreement
chunks.relation: 说明 handed over 的依据

chunks.english: which took far too little account of the patients’ rights and their expectations of privacy
chunks.chinese: 该协议远远没有充分考虑患者权利及其隐私期待

chunks.english: far too little account of the patients’ rights and their expectations of privacy
chunks.chinese: 对患者权利及其隐私期待远远太少的考虑

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: It is + 被强调状语 + that + 句子
sentence_patterns.explanation: 强调 against that background，去掉 It is...that 后主干仍完整。

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 强调句 + which 从句 + which 从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: 句中连续两个 which 从句，分别修饰 trust 和 agreement。

original: DeepMind has almost apologized.
translation_literal: DeepMind 几乎已经道歉了。

original: The NHS trust has mended its ways.
translation_literal: NHS 信托已经改正了自己的做法。

original: Further arrangements — and there may be many — between the NHS and DeepMind will be carefully scrutinised to ensure that all necessary permissions have been asked of patients and all unnecessary data has been cleaned.
translation_literal: NHS 和 DeepMind 之间的进一步安排——而且可能会有很多——将被仔细审查，以确保已经向患者请求所有必要许可，并且所有不必要数据都已被清理。

chunks.english: Further arrangements between the NHS and DeepMind
chunks.chinese: NHS 和 DeepMind 之间的进一步安排

chunks.relation: 补充说明 arrangements 的数量可能很多

chunks.english: to ensure that all necessary permissions have been asked of patients and all unnecessary data has been cleaned
chunks.chinese: 以确保已经向患者请求所有必要许可，并且所有不必要数据都已被清理

chunks.english: that all necessary permissions have been asked of patients and all unnecessary data has been cleaned
chunks.chinese: 已经向患者请求所有必要许可，并且所有不必要数据都已被清理

chunks.english: all necessary permissions have been asked of patients
chunks.chinese: 已经向患者请求所有必要许可
chunks.relation: that 从句第一并列分句

chunks.english: all unnecessary data has been cleaned
chunks.chinese: 所有不必要数据都已被清理
chunks.relation: that 从句第二并列分句

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 破折号中插入数量说明
sentence_patterns.explanation: and there may be many 插入主语内部，主干是 arrangements will be scrutinised。
ensure 后 that 从句中两个被动分句并列。

original: There are lessons about informed patient consent to learn.
translation_literal: 有关于知情患者同意的教训需要吸取。

chunks.english: There are lessons about informed patient consent to learn
chunks.chinese: 有关于知情患者同意的教训需要吸取
关于知情患者同意的教训
chunks.relation: there be 结构真实主语

original: But privacy is not the only angle in this case and not even the most important.
translation_literal: 但隐私不是这个案例中唯一的角度，甚至不是最重要的角度。

chunks.english: the only angle in this case
chunks.chinese: 这个案例中唯一的角度
chunks.relation: 作 is not 的表语

chunks.english: and not even the most important
chunks.chinese: 甚至也不是最重要的角度
chunks.relation: 与 the only angle 并列

original: Ms Denham chose to concentrate the blame on the NHS trust, since under existing law it “controlled” the data and DeepMind merely “processed” it.
translation_literal: 德纳姆女士选择把责任集中在 NHS 信托上，因为根据现行法律，它“控制”数据，而 DeepMind 只是“处理”数据。

chunks.english: to concentrate the blame on the NHS trust
chunks.chinese: 把责任集中在 NHS 信托上

chunks.english: since under existing law it “controlled” the data and DeepMind merely “processed” it
chunks.chinese: 因为根据现行法律，它控制数据，而 DeepMind 只是处理数据

chunks.relation: 说明 controlled/processed 的法律依据
第一分句主语，指 NHS trust
作 processed 的宾语，指 data

sentence_patterns.explanation: since 原因从句中 controlled 和 processed 两个法律角色并列对比。

original: But this distinction misses the point that it is processing and aggregation, not the mere possession of bits, that gives the data value.
translation_literal: 但这种区分漏掉了关键点：正是处理和聚合，而不是对数据片段的单纯占有，赋予了数据价值。

chunks.english: that it is processing and aggregation, not the mere possession of bits, that gives the data value
chunks.chinese: 正是处理和聚合，而不是对数据片段的单纯占有，赋予数据价值
chunks.relation: 解释 point 的具体内容

chunks.english: it is processing and aggregation, not the mere possession of bits, that gives the data value
chunks.chinese: 正是处理和聚合，而不是对数据片段的单纯占有，赋予数据价值
chunks.relation: 同位语从句内部强调句

chunks.english: processing and aggregation, not the mere possession of bits
chunks.chinese: 处理和聚合，而不是对数据片段的单纯占有
chunks.relation: 强调句中被强调的主语

sentence_patterns.explanation: that 从句解释 point 的内容。

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: it is + 被强调部分 + that...
sentence_patterns.explanation: 强调 processing and aggregation 才是数据价值来源。

original: The great question is who should benefit from the analysis of all the data that our lives now generate.
translation_literal: 重大问题是，谁应该从分析我们生活如今产生的所有数据中受益。

chunks.english: who should benefit from the analysis of all the data that our lives now generate
chunks.chinese: 谁应该从分析我们生活如今产生的所有数据中受益

chunks.english: the analysis of all the data that our lives now generate
chunks.chinese: 对我们生活如今产生的所有数据的分析
chunks.relation: 作 benefit from 的宾语

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 表语从句 + data 定语从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: 表语从句中 analysis 的宾语 data 又带定语从句。

original: Privacy law builds on the concept of damage to an individual from identifiable knowledge about them.
translation_literal: 隐私法建立在由关于个人的可识别知识对个人造成损害这一概念之上。

chunks.english: the concept of damage to an individual from identifiable knowledge about them
chunks.chinese: 由关于个人的可识别知识对个人造成损害这一概念
chunks.relation: 作 builds on 的宾语

chunks.english: of damage to an individual from identifiable knowledge about them

original: That misses the way the surveillance economy works.
translation_literal: 那漏掉了监控经济运行的方式。

chunks.english: the way the surveillance economy works

chunks.relation: 省略 that/in which 的定语从句，修饰 way

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: the way + 主语 + 谓语
sentence_patterns.explanation: way 后省略关系词，后面的分句说明“运行方式”。

original: The data of an individual there gains its value only when it is compared with the data of countless millions more.
translation_literal: 在那里，某个个人的数据只有在与无数其他人的数据比较时才获得其价值。

chunks.english: The data of an individual there
only when it is compared with the data of countless millions more
chunks.chinese: 只有在它与无数其他人的数据比较时
chunks.relation: 说明 gains value 的条件

chunks.english: with the data of countless millions more

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.explanation: only when 限定数据获得价值的条件。

original: The use of privacy law to curb the tech giants in this instance feels slightly maladapted.
translation_literal: 在这个案例中，使用隐私法来限制科技巨头感觉稍微有些不适配。

chunks.english: The use of privacy law to curb the tech giants in this instance
chunks.chinese: 在这个案例中使用隐私法来限制科技巨头

chunks.english: to curb the tech giants in this instance
chunks.chinese: 在这个案例中限制科技巨头的

original: This practice does not address the real worry.
translation_literal: 这种做法没有处理真正的担忧。

original: It is not enough to say that the algorithms DeepMind develops will benefit patients and save lives.
translation_literal: 说 DeepMind 开发的算法将使患者受益并拯救生命，这是不够的。

chunks.relation: 作 is not 的表语

chunks.english: to say that the algorithms DeepMind develops will benefit patients and save lives
chunks.chinese: 说 DeepMind 开发的算法将使患者受益并拯救生命
chunks.relation: 真正主语，对应形式主语 It

chunks.english: that the algorithms DeepMind develops will benefit patients and save lives
chunks.chinese: DeepMind 开发的算法将使患者受益并拯救生命

chunks.relation: 省略 that 的定语从句，修饰 algorithms

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: It is not enough to say that...
sentence_patterns.explanation: It 是形式主语，真正主语是 to say...。

original: What matters is that they will belong to a private monopoly which developed them using public resources.
translation_literal: 重要的是，它们将属于一个私人垄断企业，而该企业使用公共资源开发了它们。

chunks.english: that they will belong to a private monopoly which developed them using public resources
chunks.chinese: 它们将属于一个使用公共资源开发它们的私人垄断企业

chunks.relation: 表语从句内部主语，指 algorithms

chunks.english: a private monopoly which developed them using public resources
chunks.chinese: 一个使用公共资源开发它们的私人垄断企业
chunks.relation: 作 belong to 的宾语

chunks.english: which developed them using public resources
chunks.chinese: 使用公共资源开发了它们的

original: If software promises to save lives on the scale that drugs now can, big data may be expected to behave as big pharma has done.
translation_literal: 如果软件承诺以如今药物能够做到的规模拯救生命，大数据可能会被期待像大型制药公司那样行事。

chunks.english: If software promises to save lives on the scale that drugs now can
chunks.chinese: 如果软件承诺以如今药物能够做到的规模拯救生命

chunks.english: on the scale that drugs now can
chunks.chinese: 以如今药物能够做到的规模
chunks.relation: 说明 save lives 的规模

chunks.english: to behave as big pharma has done
chunks.chinese: 像大型制药公司那样行事
像大型制药公司已经做过的那样

sentence_patterns.explanation: as big pharma has done 表示行为方式的类比。

original: We are still at the beginning of this revolution and small choices now may turn out to have gigantic consequences later.
translation_literal: 我们仍处在这场革命的开端，而现在的小选择后来可能会证明具有巨大后果。

chunks.english: We are still at the beginning of this revolution
chunks.chinese: 我们仍处在这场革命的开端

chunks.english: at the beginning of this revolution
small choices now may turn out to have gigantic consequences later
chunks.chinese: 现在的小选择后来可能会证明具有巨大后果

sentence_patterns.explanation: and 连接当前阶段判断和未来后果判断。

original: A long struggle will be needed to avoid a future of digital feudalism.
translation_literal: 为了避免一个数字封建主义的未来，将需要一场长期斗争。

chunks.english: to avoid a future of digital feudalism
chunks.chinese: 为了避免一个数字封建主义的未来

original: Ms Denham’s report is a welcome start.
translation_literal: 德纳姆女士的报告是一个受欢迎的开端。
